sources.title: SEC EDGAR — AI company 10-K/10-Q/8-K scan
sources.notes: Scans tickers listed in data/edgar-tickers.json. Per wq-015 §2.2 — broadened from OpenAI-only. Per wq-081 (2026-05-04) — seed expanded 16 → 38 (hyperscalers/semis/DC-power/compute-pureplays/SaaS). Five foreign ADRs proposed in brief (TCEHY, SKHYY, SSNLF, SBGSY, SMNEY) deferred per data/edgar-tickers-deferred.md — not SEC filers. Routing: telemetry-feed (sec_filing source type).

sources.title: Platformonomics — Hyperscaler CapEx Tracker
sources.author: Charles Fitzgerald
sources.notes: Key cross-check source for Follow the CapEx page. Publishes quarterly big-5 hyperscaler capex breakdowns from 10-K/10-Q filings. Pioneered DC-share-of-total-capex methodology.

sources.title: FLI — EU AI Act Tracker
sources.author: Future of Life Institute
sources.notes: Primary EU AI Act status tracker per wq-015 §2.3. CC-licensed. Per Simon decision: FLI for v1, EC public register deferred as corroboration.

sources.title: Alibaba Group Investor Relations
sources.notes: Chinese hyperscaler IR per wq-015 §2.4 (ByteDance/Alibaba/Tencent/Baidu added as src-056..059). Earnings and cloud commentary.

sources.title: Tencent Holdings Investor Relations
sources.notes: Chinese hyperscaler IR per wq-015 §2.4.

sources.title: Baidu Investor Relations
sources.notes: Chinese hyperscaler IR per wq-015 §2.4. Ernie/Wenxin model commentary.

sources.title: ByteDance Corporate Newsroom
sources.notes: ByteDance is private (no IR page). Using the corporate newsroom as the canonical press endpoint per wq-015 §2.4. Re-evaluate if ByteDance IPOs.

sources.title: ERCOT — GIS Report + Large Load Integration
sources.notes: Largest US AI-DC concentration — 226 GW requests, ~77% datacenter per wq-012 §1. XLSX monthly. Large Load Integration form carries explicit load-type flag.

sources.title: PJM — New Services Queue
sources.notes: 32 GW load forecast, ~30 GW DC (wq-012 §1). Post-2025 co-location rule forces end-customer naming. Pair with Virginia DEQ + SCC docket search when an LLC needs deanonymising.

sources.title: EIA API — 860M / 930 / STEO
sources.notes: 860M + 930 + STEO endpoints per wq-012 §1. Free API key, 5000 rows/req. STEO now explicitly attributes datacenter load. Requires EIA_API_KEY env var at extraction time. Audit 2026-05-04 (wq-081): no snapshots ever created since wq-012 registration; EIA_API_KEY now in repo secrets — verify on next cron.

sources.title: NESO TEC Register (UK)
sources.notes: Best-in-class cadence (twice-weekly Tue/Fri upstream; weekly at Ledger level) per wq-012 §1. CSV, OGL licence. Gate 1 / Gate 2 classifier from Nov 2025.

sources.title: Epoch AI — Frontier Data Centers Hub
sources.author: Epoch AI
sources.notes: CC-BY. Already does LLC → AI-lab attribution via permits + satellite imagery (wq-012 §3.2). Seeds data/datacenter-attribution-map.json and also emits power_project claims directly.

sources.title: USPTO PatentSearch API
sources.notes: Public API, rate-limited. Per wq-013 §3.1. CPC filter per §10. Group by assignee; consult data/company-alias-map.json for disambiguation.

sources.title: Google Patents BigQuery dataset
sources.notes: STUBBED pending GCP credentials (Simon Q4 decision). Provides international patent coverage (CN/EU) that USPTO lacks. Adapter will log "credentials required" until GCP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON is set.

sources.title: EPO Open Patent Services (OPS)
sources.notes: STUBBED pending EPO_OPS_KEY — discovered 2026-05-04 during wq-081: src-067 was set status=active in wq-013 but EPO_OPS_CLIENT_ID / EPO_OPS_CLIENT_SECRET were never added to repo secrets, so the daily cron has been silently env-gating to []. Flipping to pending_credentials per src-066 google_patents_bq stub pattern. Activate after EPO_OPS_KEY (Simon: pending ~this week). Original wq-013 §3.1 routing/cadence preserved: free up to 250 req/week, OAuth registration at https://developers.epo.org/.

sources.title: DoL OFLC LCA quarterly disclosure
sources.notes: Quarterly XLSX drops per wq-013 §3.2. AI-engineer regex filter per §9. Requires openpyxl — v1 stub if absent.

sources.title: Greenhouse Job Board API
sources.notes: Public JSON, no auth. Per-company board via token from data/company-alias-map.json[<slug>].ats.token. Emits hiring_snapshot claims. Per wq-013 §3.6 / §7.

sources.title: Lever Postings API
sources.notes: Public JSON, no auth. Per-company slug via data/company-alias-map.json. Emits hiring_snapshot claims. Per wq-013 §3.6 / §7.

sources.title: Ashby Public Job Posting API
sources.notes: Public JSON per-company-token. Emits hiring_snapshot claims. Per wq-013 §3.6 / §7.

sources.title: Workable Jobs widget API
sources.notes: Public widget JSON per-account. Emits hiring_snapshot claims. Per wq-013 §3.6 / §7.

sources.title: CAISO — Generator Interconnection Queue
sources.notes: wq-081 Phase 1.1 Tier B — closes Stream 2 west-coast gap per source-collation-phase1-brief.md §3a item 5. Clones iso_queue_ercot/pjm v1 posture: snapshot landing HTML, surface XLSX download links, defer row-parse to v2 (gated on openpyxl). Power-side denominator coverage — not entity coverage. Routing decision: structured power_project claims (when v2 lands) → telemetry-feed.json per _telemetry_router.TELEMETRY_STRUCTURED_TYPES.

sources.title: FRED API — St Louis Fed macro denominators
sources.organization: Federal Reserve Bank of St Louis
sources.notes: wq-081 Phase 1.1 Tier B — FRED_API_KEY now in repo secrets (added 2026-05-04). Adapter is real (not stub) and fetches a 3-series macro denominator basket: GDP, GDPC1, CPIAUCSL. Status will flip to active on first successful cron extraction. Coverage classification: **denominator coverage** (US macro) — NOT entity coverage. Replaces wb-imf-weo manual copy per brief §3a item 3.

sources.title: World Bank Indicators API
sources.notes: wq-081 Phase 1.1 Tier B — public REST, no auth. v1 fetches NY.GDP.MKTP.CD (nominal GDP) for {WLD, USA, CHN} as a smoke test; v2 expands to per-country basket + indicator set. Coverage classification: **denominator coverage** (global macro) — NOT entity coverage. Replaces wb-national-accounts manual copy per brief §3a item 4.

sources.title: ABS — Australian Bureau of Statistics SDMX API
sources.notes: wq-081 Phase 1.1 Tier B — SDMX-JSON, public, no auth. v1 fetches ABS_GDPE_H (National Accounts expenditure) from 2024-Q1; v2 expands to series catalogue. Coverage classification: **denominator coverage** (AU macro, HA differentiator) — NOT entity coverage. Split from RBA per stop-gate D — operationally separate (SDMX vs CSV).

sources.title: RBA — Reserve Bank of Australia Statistical Tables
sources.notes: wq-081 Phase 1.1 Tier B — CSV/XLSX statistical tables, public, no auth. v1 captures landing page snapshot + surfaces CSV download URLs (Table A1 baseline); v2 row-parse follow-up. Coverage classification: **denominator coverage** (AU monetary aggregates, HA differentiator) — NOT entity coverage. Split from ABS per stop-gate D.

sources.title: AEMO NEM Data Dashboard
sources.notes: wq-081 Phase 1.1 Tier B — public CSV, no auth. v1 captures landing page snapshot + surfaces CSV download URLs; v2 row-parse follow-up. Coverage classification: **denominator coverage** (AU grid + DC build-out, HA differentiator) — NOT entity coverage. Routing: structured power_project claims (v2) → telemetry-feed.json per _telemetry_router.TELEMETRY_STRUCTURED_TYPES.

sources.title: GitHub REST API — repo telemetry
sources.notes: wq-081 Phase 1.1 Tier C — STRICTLY TELEMETRY-ONLY per stop-gate A. Source type 'github_repo' is in _telemetry_router.TELEMETRY_SOURCE_TYPES, so all emitted records auto-route to telemetry-feed.json (NOT vault-inbox). v1 fetches stargazers/forks for 6 frontier-lab repos; v2 expands repo list + adds release-tag tracking. Lab release announcements are picked up via Week 2 newsroom RSS, NOT here, to avoid dedup overhead. GITHUB_TOKEN env var optional (raises rate limit 60→5000 req/hr); v1's 6-repo list works without it.

sources.title: Hugging Face Hub API — model registry telemetry
sources.notes: wq-081 Phase 1.1 Tier C — STRICTLY TELEMETRY-ONLY per stop-gate A. Source type 'package_index' is in _telemetry_router.TELEMETRY_SOURCE_TYPES, so all emitted records auto-route to telemetry-feed.json (NOT vault-inbox). v1 fetches top-5 models by downloads for 6 frontier-lab orgs (meta-llama, mistralai, deepseek-ai, google, openai-community, Anthropic). Public read endpoint, no auth. New-model release announcements are picked up via Week 2 newsroom RSS / lab newsrooms, NOT here.

sources.title: Anthropic News
sources.notes: wq-083 Phase 1.2 Tier A — lab newsroom (brief §3b #9). RSS endpoint not yet located after 2 attempts (/news/feed → 404, /rss.xml → 404); URL points at canonical news landing page. extract_web_page fallback works for HTML scraping. Verify direct RSS URL on next manual check. News page only — DO NOT include the technical blog (spec §8 #3). Confidence pre-rating: Low (tertiary editorial source per data-sourcing-policy).

sources.title: Google DeepMind Blog
sources.notes: wq-083 Phase 1.2 Tier A — lab newsroom (brief §3b #10). DeepMind has historically irregular RSS exposure; per skip-and-log C, registered with extraction_method=web_extract on canonical blog URL rather than fighting the RSS spec. Maps to entity: google. Confidence pre-rating: Low until human review.

sources.title: Meta AI Blog
sources.notes: wq-083 Phase 1.2 Tier A — lab newsroom (brief §3b #11). Meta AI Blog has irregular RSS exposure; per skip-and-log C, registered with extraction_method=web_extract on canonical blog URL. Maps to entity: meta. Confidence pre-rating: Low until human review.

sources.title: Mistral AI News
sources.notes: wq-083 Phase 1.2 Tier A — lab newsroom (brief §3b #12). RSS endpoint not located after 2 attempts (/feed.xml → 404, /rss.xml → 404); URL points at canonical news landing page. extract_web_page fallback works for HTML. Maps to entity: mistral. Verify direct RSS URL on next manual check. Confidence pre-rating: Low until human review.

sources.title: Microsoft AI Blog
sources.notes: wq-083 Phase 1.2 Tier A — hyperscaler product velocity (brief §3b #13). Working RSS confirmed (HTTP 200, valid RSS 2.0). Maps to entity: openai (Copilot/Azure-AI angle covers OpenAI consolidation per cohort spec). Confidence pre-rating: Low until human review.

sources.title: AWS What's New + ML Blog
sources.notes: wq-083 Phase 1.2 Tier A — hyperscaler product velocity (brief §3b #14). Working RSS confirmed (HTTP 200, 'Recent Announcements'). NO rendered entity — covers infrastructure/denominator side per cohort spec ('note as denominator/infra coverage'). Note: cohort_metrics classify_coverage will misclassify this as 'entity' default since rss_feed isn't in DENOMINATOR_METHODS — known artefact, manual override needed in PR snapshot. AWS daily feed cadence is high-volume; confidence Low until human review filters.

sources.title: Google Cloud AI Blog
sources.notes: wq-083 Phase 1.2 Tier A — hyperscaler product velocity (brief §3b #15). Working RSS confirmed (HTTP 200, 'What Google Cloud announced in AI this month'). Maps to entity: google. Distinct from DeepMind Blog (src-082) — this covers Cloud Next product announcements, TPU/Hypercomputer infra, Gemini Enterprise tooling. Confidence pre-rating: Low until human review.
